params: desc="统计 skills 目录下的一级子目录数量", cmd="find "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ECC-main/skills" -maxdepth 1 -ty"
desc="统计 skills 目录下的 SKILL.md 文件数量", cmd="find "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ECC-main/skills" -name "SKILL.md"
desc="统计 skills 目录下一级子目录（每个子目录=一个skill）", cmd="ls -d "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ECC-main/skills"/*/ | wc -l"
desc="准确统计 skill 目录数量", cmd="find "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ECC-main/skills" -maxdepth 1 -ty"
desc="检查要删除的 12 个翻译目录", cmd="echo "=== 检查 docs 翻译目录 ===" && for d in de-DE es ja-JP ko-KR"
command: echo "=== 检查 docs 翻译目录 ===" && for d in de-DE es ja-JP ko-KR pt-BR ru th tr ur vi-VN zh-CN zh-TW; do test -d "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ECC-main/docs/$d" && echo "EXISTS: docs/$d" || echo "MISSING: docs/$d"; done

params: desc="检查 ecc-fork 中的 4 个源文件", cmd="for f in prisma-patterns backend-patterns coding-standards s"
command: for f in prisma-patterns backend-patterns coding-standards security-review; do test -f "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ecc-fork/skills/$f/SKILL.md" && echo "EXISTS: skills/$f/SKILL.md" || echo "MISSING: skills/$f/SKILL.md"; done

params: desc="检查插件缓存目录", cmd="test -d "C:/Users/ASUS/.claude/plugins/cache/ecc/ecc/2.0.0-r"
command: test -d "C:/Users/ASUS/.claude/plugins/cache/ecc/ecc/2.0.0-rc.1/skills" && echo "EXISTS: plugin cache" || echo "MISSING: plugin cache"

params: desc="操作二：同步 PR #2336 的 4 个 SKILL.md", cmd="SRC="C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ecc-fork/skills" DST="C:/Users/AS"
command: SRC="C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ecc-fork/skills" DST="C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ECC-main/skills" && for f in prisma-patterns backend-patterns coding-standards security-review; do cp "$SRC/$f/SKILL.md" "$DST/$f/SKILL.md" && echo "同步: skills/$f/SKILL.md"; done && echo "操作二完成"

params: desc="操作三：同步到插件缓存", cmd="SRC="C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ecc-fork/skills" DST="C:/Users/AS"
command: SRC="C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ecc-fork/skills" DST="C:/Users/ASUS/.claude/plugins/cache/ecc/ecc/2.0.0-rc.1/skills" && for f in prisma-patterns backend-patterns coding-standards security-review; do cp "$SRC/$f/SKILL.md" "$DST/$f/SKILL.md" && echo "缓存: skills/$f/SKILL.md"; done && echo "操作三完成"

params: desc="操作一：删除 12 个非英文翻译目录", cmd="cd "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ECC-main" && for d in docs/de-DE d"
command: cd "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ECC-main" && for d in docs/de-DE docs/es docs/ja-JP docs/ko-KR docs/pt-BR docs/ru docs/th docs/tr docs/ur docs/vi-VN docs/zh-CN docs/zh-TW; do rm -rf "$d" && echo "删除: $d"; done && echo "操作一完成"

params: desc="验证修改结果", cmd="echo "=== 验证 docs 目录 ===" && ls -d "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/EC"
command: echo "=== 验证 docs 目录 ===" && ls -d "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ECC-main/docs/"*/ 2>/dev/null && echo "=== 验证 prisma-patterns ===" && grep -c "Option A\|Option B" "C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/ECC-main/skills/prisma-patterns/SKILL.md" && echo "=== 验证 error.issues (应为 0 个 error.errors) ===" && for f in backend-pa
